headline: Moody's Flags Slower Growth Ahead for Asia's Private Credit Market
summary: Moody’s Ratings has revealed that private credit fundraising across Asia-Pacific is expected to slow over the next 12 to 18 months.

headline: KKR & Co. (KKR) Fell 27% Despite a Strong Recovery in March
summary: RiverPark Advisors, an investment advisory firm and sponsor of the RiverPark family of mutual funds, released its “RiverPark Large Growth Fund” Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The US stock market declined in the quarter with the S&P 500 index (“S&P”) and the Russell 1000 Growth index (“RLG”) falling […]

headline: Software Markdowns at Mutual Funds Hint at Private Markets’ Pain
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Executives at some of Wall Street’s biggest names have faced a barrage of recent questions about whether artificial intelligence has crippled the value of their software investments.Most Read from BloombergGreece Offers Bounty to Catch Ravenous Fish Lured by Warming SeaOil, Gas Tankers Cross Hormuz Via Oman-Side Route After U-TurnsThe Tanker Tycoon Making Millions on Hormuz Shuttle RunsModi’s Flagship Biofuel Push Faces Backlash From MotoristsFIFA Allows Balogun to Play After Trum
